name: Quick Blueberry Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, mix the ice cream and self-rising flour.
2. Fold in the fresh blueberries.
3. Spoon the mixture into six greased muffin cups.
4. Bake at 375°F for 20-25 minutes, or until the muffins are done when tested with a toothpick.
5. While the muffins are still hot, brush the tops with melted butter and sprinkle with sugar.
6. Serve warm.
